name: Fiduciary Documentation
description: All Trust_Irrevocable (IRR) deposits must be classified and insured under the Irrevocable Trust category, applying per-beneficiary coverage of up to $250,000. The trust agreement and beneficiary schedule must be documented and applied correctly.
failure_reason: IRR ownership category not implemented in TRUST-INSURANCE-CALC.cob — falls through to ORC=SGL (Single depositor) fallback. BeneficiaryClassifier.java also has IRR → SGL mapping in switch statement.

name: Trust Account Data Completeness
description: All trust accounts must be loaded from TRUST-MASTER before calculation begins.

name: Beneficiary Count Cap
description: Revocable trust coverage is capped at 5 beneficiaries unless documentation supports more.
failure_reason: config/trust-config.properties: rev.beneficiary.cap=5 is stale — regulation allows up to 250. DEF-TCS-002.
